commits.message:
Dockerfile autofix PRs include Grype/Anchore fixes (#1723)

- Extend Dockerfile autofix script to include the union of Grype (Anchore) and Trivy results.
- Skip reviewer lottery when PR already has a requested reviewer, so autofix PR reviewers survive the close/reopen CI dance.
- Change formatting of table to use html so we don't see a blank header like in fix: patch Dockerfile for OS-level CVEs flagged by Trivy/Anchore #1722.
- Added tests! They run in our precommit hook. when patch-dockerfile.rb changes
commits.author: Ben Calegari

commits.message:
FFS-4384: Preserve applicant during redaction (#1715)

Now, Applicants will not be redacted if they have an Invitation that has not expired. They will be redacted once the invitation expires.
commits.author: Tim Miller

commits.message:
FFS-4012: Add validation error for blank less-than-half-time hours entry (#1699)

When the user has a partially self-attested education activity, we
previously permitted them to answer "0" for all terms.

This commit duplicates the validation logic in the shared hours input
controller/partial into the Education::TermCreditHoursController so that
we can validate that at least some credit hours have been reported.
commits.author: Tom Dooner

releases.name: v1.0.0
releases.body:
## archival-identifier
A GitHub Action to identify repositories that are candidates for archival based on development activity, usage, criticality score, and repository contents.


## What's Changed
* Action: Create MVP action with python script to determine archival candidacy by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/4
* Add changelog sub-action by @DinneK in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/7
* Add usage to README by @DinneK in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/8
* Action: Update inactivity script and action.yml to reflect new super-changelog subaction by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/9
* Action: Updated active fork logic and status determination logic by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/10
* Docs: Add content for CONTRIBUTING.md, COMMUNITY.md and CODEOWNERS.md by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/11
* Action: Add empty-repos functionality and minor edits by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/12
* Action: Minor edits by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/13
* Action: Update criticality score functionality by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/14
* Docs: Complete README.md and updated CONTRIBUTING.md by @natalialuzuriaga in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/15

## New Contributors
* @natalialuzuriaga made their first contribution in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/4
* @DinneK made their first contribution in https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DSACMS/archival-identifier/commits/v1.0.0
releases.author: natalialuzuriaga
